reviews.comment:
Quiero agradecer la excelente calidad humana del personal de esta Estación de Servicio, que siempre me gustó por su entorno arbolado y apacible para parar. El pasado lunes olvide en el baño mi riñonera con todos mis documentos e incluso dinero , me di cuenta al llegar a Buenos Aires. Pude contactarme telefónicamente yk Leonela Sánchez, empleada de allí la encontró , entregándosela a  Juan el Encargado , hasta llegar a manos de Miguel Basigualepe Jefe de la misma, quien la guardo intacta y posteriormente la entrego a quien me la traería a Buenos Aires.
Excelente predisposición de parte de cada uno de ellos. Si siempre me gustó esta estación de servicio ... Ahora me gusta aún más!! Super recomendable!!
Muchísimas GRACIAS!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I want to express my gratitude for the excellent customer service of the staff at this service station, which I've always loved for its peaceful, tree-lined setting. Last Monday, I forgot my fanny pack in the restroom, containing all my documents and even some money. I only realized it when I arrived back in Buenos Aires. I was able to contact Leonela Sánchez, an employee there, by phone, and she found it. She gave it to Juan, the manager, and it eventually reached Miguel Basigualepe, the station manager, who kept it safe and sound and later gave it to the person who would bring it to me in Buenos Aires.
Everyone there was incredibly helpful. If I've always liked this service station... now I like it even more! Highly recommended!
Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROcnZya0pBEAE
